$comment: Sector ETFs that are NOT 'core' for watchlist tier 1/2 ranking. The full universe is read at runtime from the Relative Sector Performance layout in TradingView; anything in this list is bucketed as a candidate for Honorary Mentions instead of core slots.
$comment_lookback: Trading days used for sector return ranking. ~21 = 1 calendar month.
$comment_target: Always include this many core sectors (Tier 1 + Tier 2 combined), provided enough are positive on an absolute basis.
$comment_layout: Exact TradingView layout name for the weekly sector ranking source. Update if you rename the layout.
